info.title: Currencies
info.description: APIs for currencies management in CRM.

get.description: Retrieves all added currencies in the organization.

schema.description: Response object containing a list of currencies.

currencies.description: List of currencies configured for the organization.

items.description: Currency object containing metadata and format details.

prefix_symbol.description: Indicates whether the currency symbol is shown before the amount.

format.description: Currency formatting rules including numeral style, decimals and separators.

numeral_system.description: Number formatting style: Indian (1,00,000) vs International (100,000).

decimal_places.description: Number of decimal digits displayed for the currency.

decimal_separator.description: Symbol used to separate the fractional decimal part.

thousand_separator.description: Symbol used to group thousands in numeric values.

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate relative to the base currency (supports up to 9 digits and 9 decimal places).

is_active.description: Indicates whether the currency is active and available for use.

exchange_rate_auto_update.description: Indicates whether the currency has the automated exchange rate option enabled or not.

iso_code.description: ISO standard currency code. Example: INR, USD.

symbol.description: Symbol used to represent the currency.

name.description: Name of the currency. Example: Indian Rupee.

is_base.description: Indicates whether this currency is the organization's base currency.

created_by.description: User who created the currency record.

name.description: Name of the user who created the record.

id.description: User ID of the record creator.

modified_by.description: User who last updated the currency record.

name.description: Name of the user who modified the record.

id.description: User ID of the last modifier.

modified_time.description: Timestamp when the currency was last modified.

created_time.description: Timestamp when the currency was first created.

exchange_rate_updated_time.description: Timestamp when the exchange rate was last modified.

204.description: No content — occurs if no currencies are available.

post.description: Creates one or more new currencies for the organization.

schema.description: Request object containing a list of currencies to create.

currencies.description: List of currencies to be added.

format.description: Formatting rules for numbers displayed in this currency.

numeral_system.description: Numbering system used for grouping digits.

decimal_places.description: Number of decimal places used for the currency.

decimal_separator.description: Character used to separate whole number and fractional part.

thousand_separator.description: Character used for separating thousand groups.

exchange_rate.description: Conversion rate relative to the base currency. Supports up to 9 digits and 9 decimal places.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the currency is active.

exchange_rate_auto_update.description: Indicates whether the currency has the automated exchange rate option enabled or not.

iso_code.description: Standard ISO currency code. Must be unique.

name.description: Full currency name as configured in CRM.

currencies.description: List of successfully created currency responses.

400.description: Bad request. The input data is invalid or missing required values.

schema.description: Possible error responses for currency creation operation.

code.description: Error code indicating type of error.

details.description: Extra information related to permission error.

permissions.description: List of required permissions that were missing.

oneOf.description: Currency validation errors for bulk operations.

currencies.description: List of currency errors for bulk operations.

items.description: Error response with validation details for a single currency record.

code.description: Error code indicating type of error.

details.description: Extra information related to validation error.

api_name.description: Name of the parameter causing validation error.

json_path.description: JSON pointer to the invalid property location.

expected_data_type.description: Required datatype for the field when applicable.

limit.description: Limit count reference for maximum allowed active currencies.

put.description: Updates one or more currencies other than the base currency.

schema.description: Request body to update currency values in the organization.

currencies.description: List of currencies to be updated.

id.description: Unique ID of the currency to update. Obtainable from GET /org/currencies.

numeral_system.description: Specifies whether the currency uses the Indian numbering format (1,00,000) or International format (100,000).

decimal_places.description: Number of decimal places allowed for currency values.

decimal_separator.description: Character used to separate the integer portion from the fractional portion.

thousand_separator.description: Character used to group thousands in the currency format.

exchange_rate.description: Conversion rate of this currency relative to the base currency.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the currency is active in the organization.

exchange_rate_auto_update.description: Indicates whether the currency has the automated exchange rate option enabled or not.

iso_code.description: ISO code of the currency. NOTE: During update, ISO code cannot be modified.

symbol.description: Symbol used to display the currency

name.description: Name of the currency. NOTE: During update, currency name cannot be modified.

schema.description: Response returned for a successful update operation.

400.description: Bad request. Input validation errors or disallowed update field.

schema.description: Possible error responses for currency update operation.

code.description: Error identifier representing the failure type.

permissions.description: List of required permissions missing for the current user.

status.description: Indicates that the response represents an error condition.

currencies.description: Array of currency error objects representing individual validation or permission errors.

items.description: An object representing a single currency-related error.

code.description: Error identifier representing the validation failure type.

details.description: Additional debugging metadata for the error. Provides field-level or permission-level details.

api_name.description: The field name, API parameter, or array index related to the error.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the field that caused the error.

limit.description: Maximum allowed limit relevant to the error, e.g., max active currencies.

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the invalid field.

maximum_decimal_place.description: Maximum allowed decimal places for currency values.

status.description: Indicates that the response represents an error condition.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific currency via its unique currency ID.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the currency to retrieve.

currencies.description: Array containing the requested currency object.

items.description: Currency object with formatting, exchange info and settings.

prefix_symbol.description: If true, the currency symbol appears before the numerical value.

format.description: Defines how the currency value is displayed including separators and numeral system.

numeral_system.description: Numeral grouping system used for formatting.

decimal_places.description: Number of digits shown after decimal point.

thousand_separator.description: Character used for grouping thousand digits.

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate relative to the base currency.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the currency is currently active.

exchange_rate_auto_update.description: Indicates whether the currency has the automated exchange rate option enabled or not.

is_base.description: Indicates whether this is the base currency of the organization.

id.description: Unique ID associated with this currency.

created_by.description: User who created the currency record.

name.description: Name of the user who created this currency.

modified_by.description: User who last modified the currency record.

name.description: Name of the user who last updated this currency.

id.description: User ID of the last modifier.

modified_time.description: Timestamp when the currency was last modified.

created_time.description: Timestamp when the currency was initially created.

exchange_rate_updated_time.description: Timestamp when the exchange rate was last modified.

204.description: No content — currency not found or nothing to return.

put.description: Update a specific currency by its unique ID.

schema.description: Payload for updating a specific currency by ID.

currencies.description: List of currencies to update (single-element array expected).

numeral_system.description: Defines the numbering system used for digit grouping.

decimal_places.description: Specifies number of fractional digits allowed in currency format.

decimal_separator.description: Character used to separate whole numbers and fractional part.

thousand_separator.description: Character used to separate thousands for currency display.

exchange_rate.description: Rate at which this currency exchanges with the base currency.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the currency is active and available for use.

exchange_rate_auto_update.description: Indicates whether the currency has the automated exchange rate option enabled or not.

200.description: Successfully updated the specified currency record(s).

schema.description: Response object containing updated currency data.

details.description: Detailed information about the currency update

400.description: Bad request. The input contains malformed or invalid values.

schema.description: Possible error responses for currency update operation.

code.description: Error identifier representing the failure type.

permissions.description: List of required permissions missing for the current user.

status.description: Indicates that the response represents an error condition.

currencies.description: Array of currency error objects representing individual validation or permission errors.

items.description: An object representing a single currency-related error.

code.description: Error identifier representing the validation failure type.

details.description: Additional debugging metadata for the error. Provides field-level or permission-level details.

api_name.description: The field name, API parameter, or array index related to the error.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the field that caused the error.

limit.description: Maximum allowed limit relevant to the error, e.g., max active currencies.

expected_data_type.description: Expected data type for the invalid field.

status.description: Indicates that the response represents an error condition.

post.description: Enable multi-currency for the organization and set the base currency.

schema.description: Payload for creating and enabling base currency.

prefix_symbol.description: If true, currency symbol is shown before value.

iso_code.description: ISO currency code (e.g., USD, INR, EUR).

exchange_rate.description: Value of currency relative to base currency.

numeral_system.description: Indicates whether the currency should use the Indian or International numbering format.

decimal_places.description: Number of decimal places to display for the currency value.

decimal_separator.description: Character used to separate whole numbers from fractional decimal values.

thousand_separator.description: Character used to group thousands in numeric values.

name.description: Full name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar - USD).

200.description: Successfully enabled and created base currency.

id.description: ID of the created base currency.

schema.description: Error response for multi-currency enablement. Can contain general errors or base_currency-specific errors.

code.description: Error identifier representing the failure type.

details.description: Optional metadata for general errors (permissions etc.).

base_currency.description: Optional base_currency error object for currency-specific errors.

details.description: Additional details for base_currency error (field name, JSON path).

api_name.description: Field or API parameter related to the error.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the error field.

schema.description: Payload for modifying existing base currency.

exchange_rate.description: Updated exchange rate. It should be one

numeral_system.description: Numbering system used for grouping digits.

id.description: ID of the created base currency.

schema.description: Error response for multi-currency enablement. Can contain general errors or base_currency-specific errors.

code.description: Error identifier representing the failure type.

details.description: Optional metadata for general errors (permissions etc.).

base_currency.description: Optional base_currency error object for currency-specific errors.

details.description: Additional details for base_currency error (field name, JSON path).

api_name.description: Field or API parameter related to the error.

json_path.description: JSON path pointing to the error field.

Currency.name: currency
Currency.description: Path parameter identifying the currency ID.
